title: Term
text: This Agreement shall commence on {{effective_date}} and shall continue for a period of {{license_term}}{{lease_term}} unless earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof. On expiry of the term, this Agreement shall not be automatically renewed and the Licensee/Tenant shall be required to vacate the Premises and hand over peaceful possession to the Licensor/Landlord. Any holding over by the Licensee/Tenant after expiry of the term without the written consent of the Licensor/Landlord shall be on a month-to-month basis at the same terms and conditions and terminable by either Party on fifteen (15) days' written notice.
